args.help: TSV of ground-truth cluster labels (cell_id, truths)
Pre-integration AnnData H5AD file (source of per-cell batch labels via obs/_index, obs/<batch_var>)
Dataset properties YAML (batch_var/sample_var/labels_var) naming which obs column in rawdata_h5ad holds the batch label
Pre-integration joint PCA embedding TSV (cell_id, PCs) from the PCA stage — the 'before' embedding for local-structure-distortion metrics (CellMixS ldfDiff; scib-metrics pcr_comparison)
Cluster labels TSV (cell_id, cluster) from clustering performed on the integrated/corrected embedding (CLUST-C stage)
